description: Fork-Join 20-Queue using DEVS formalism - 20 parallel branches with synchronizing join

atomic_models.name: Forker
atomic_models.description: Replicates each arriving job to all parallel branches

atomic_models.name: Joiner
atomic_models.description: Synchronizes completed parts from 20 parallel branches

internal_transitions.condition: part_1_count > 0 and part_2_count > 0 and part_3_count > 0 and part_4_count > 0 and part_5_count > 0 and part_6_count > 0 and part_7_count > 0 and part_8_count > 0 and part_9_count > 0 and part_10_count > 0 and part_11_count > 0 and part_12_count > 0 and part_13_count > 0 and part_14_count > 0 and part_15_count > 0 and part_16_count > 0 and part_17_count > 0 and part_18_count > 0 and part_19_count > 0 and part_20_count > 0

not (part_1_count > 0 and part_2_count > 0 and part_3_count > 0 and part_4_count > 0 and part_5_count > 0 and part_6_count > 0 and part_7_count > 0 and part_8_count > 0 and part_9_count > 0 and part_10_count > 0 and part_11_count > 0 and part_12_count > 0 and part_13_count > 0 and part_14_count > 0 and part_15_count > 0 and part_16_count > 0 and part_17_count > 0 and part_18_count > 0 and part_19_count > 0 and part_20_count > 0)

internal_transitions.state_change: part_1_count := part_1_count - 1; part_2_count := part_2_count - 1; part_3_count := part_3_count - 1; part_4_count := part_4_count - 1; part_5_count := part_5_count - 1; part_6_count := part_6_count - 1; part_7_count := part_7_count - 1; part_8_count := part_8_count - 1; part_9_count := part_9_count - 1; part_10_count := part_10_count - 1; part_11_count := part_11_count - 1; part_12_count := part_12_count - 1; part_13_count := part_13_count - 1; part_14_count := part_14_count - 1; part_15_count := part_15_count - 1; part_16_count := part_16_count - 1; part_17_count := part_17_count - 1; part_18_count := part_18_count - 1; part_19_count := part_19_count - 1; part_20_count := part_20_count - 1
